creator: croyle@gelemna.ft-wayne.in.us
text:
The tiff34 port looks for c++rt0.o in /usr/lib, and it isn't there any
more.

Fix: Apply this patch.  I've tested it under both 2.2-stable and
3.0-current.
How-To-Repeat: On a machine running a current 3.0-current, clear out any leftover
libraries in /usr/lib.  Then try to build ports/graphics/tiff34.
